[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1100111 5
1 0011011 4
2 1100111 5
3 0001000 1
4 1010010 3
5 0000111 3
6 0101101 4
7 1111101 6

01 0000000 a
12 0000000 a
23 0001101 3
34 1100000 2
45 0010000 1
56 0000100 1
67 0001000 1 match 3
70 1110010 4

02 0000000 a
13 0001101 3
24 1101001 4
35 1110000 3
46 0010100 2
57 0001100 2
60 1101010 4
71 1010010 3 match 4

03 0000101 2
14 0101001 3
25 1110001 4
36 0010000 1
47 0000100 1
50 0001010 2
61 1000010 2
72 0000010 1

04 0000001 1
15 0100001 2
26 0010101 3
37 0000000 a
40 0010010 2
51 0000010 1
62 0000010 1
73 0000000 a

05 0000001 1
16 0000101 2
27 0001101 3
